text.title: prompt-engineering-evaluation Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for prompt-engineering-evaluation. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Every production prompt MUST have: a defined accuracy or quality baseline, a minimum acceptable threshold, and a regression test set of at least 10 representative inputs. Consistency must be measured across at least 3 independent runs on the same inputs.
rule.rationale: Without a baseline, teams cannot distinguish improvements from regressions. Without a threshold, prompts are deployed on subjective judgment. Without regression tests, every change risks breaking existing functionality.
